title: Standardised Falls Screening for Home Care Agencies

seo.title: Falls Prevention for Home Care Agencies | Able Care
seo.description: Standardised falls screening for PE-backed, franchised and independent home care agencies. Protect HHVBP. Reduce hospitalisation. Under five minutes per client.

blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Older woman using GripAble sensor at home
blocks.headline: Standardised falls screening for home care agencies.
blocks.subtitle: Protect HHVBP. Standardise across every branch. Reduce hospitalisation. Free your care managers to focus on care.

tiles.label: Clinicians
tiles.benefit: Objective metrics in the flow of care.

blocks.heading: Technology built for the frontline
blocks.body: Able Assess was designed for the care manager's day, not the IT department's roadmap. Five minutes at the kitchen table. No clinical certification required. Results flow straight into the care plan.
blocks.imageAlt: Care manager running an Able Assess screening with a client at home

blocks.heading: How it works in home care

steps.title: Capture
steps.description: A care manager runs a five-minute assessment on any tablet during a routine visit.

steps.title: Score
steps.description: Able Assess scores grip strength, sit-to-stand, gait speed and timed up-and-go against normative data instantly.

steps.title: Act
steps.description: Risk banding triggers care plan updates and referrals, routed to the right clinical team.

steps.title: Track
steps.description: Longitudinal trends surface decline early, protecting HHVBP outcomes and reducing hospitalisations.

blocks.heading: Four metrics, one picture of function

metrics.name: Grip strength
metrics.description: Upper-body strength proxy. Predicts all-cause mortality and hospitalisation risk.

metrics.name: Sit-to-stand
metrics.description: Lower-limb power and balance. A key indicator of fall likelihood.

metrics.name: Gait speed
metrics.description: The 'sixth vital sign' for older adults. Linked to rehospitalisation rates.

metrics.name: Timed Up and Go
metrics.description: Falls risk in under a minute. Validated across home and clinical settings.

blocks.heading: How much could you save?
blocks.body: Model HHVBP upside and hospitalisation savings in 60 seconds.

blocks.heading: Common questions from home care operators

items.question: What hardware do we need?
items.answer: A GripAble sensor and any tablet. The sensor connects via Bluetooth. No additional infrastructure required.

items.question: Can non-clinical staff run the assessment?
items.answer: Yes. Able Assess was built for non-clinical staff. The workflow guides them through every step. No training course required.

items.question: How does it integrate with our existing systems?
items.answer: Able Assess is integration-ready with EHR and OASIS platforms. The clinical team can walk you through the setup during a demo.

items.question: Where is the data stored?
items.answer: ISO 27001 certified, HIPAA aligned, GDPR compliant. Data residency options available for US and UK.

items.question: How does this help with HHVBP?
items.answer: Falls outcomes feed HHVBP measures directly. Reducing hospitalisations from falls protects your HHVBP performance and revenue.

items.question: What does it cost?
items.answer: Pricing is based on the number of branches and assessment volume. The ROI calculator models payback against one reduced fall per branch per month. Book a demo to discuss your specific scenario.

blocks.heading: See Able Assess in your workflow.
blocks.body: 20 minutes with a clinician who has run it in the field.
